# MOLT Subject Libraries

This folder contains grouped HUMAN/library views for subject-style MOLT families that are important enough to read as coherent libraries rather than only as scattered browse entries.

## Current grouped libraries
- AIM
- NEED
- USE

## Purpose
These files give the public HUMAN lane a cleaner source-library feel closer to the private Resleever source structure, while still preserving the machine-facing JSON files in the block library.
